$comment: Budgets for the static import closure of each Vite entry. Baseline (2026-07-13): resources/js/app.ts = 6 chunks / 458,094 bytes / 145,603 gzip bytes; resources/css/app.css = 1 chunk / 161,299 bytes / 24,799 gzip bytes. Budgets are baseline + ~20% headroom. Raise only with a measured justification recorded in docs/architecture/frontend-asset-boundaries.md.
